query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
## Summary

I researched Magnificent 7 large acquisitions ($10B+) in 2026, with focus on any pending deals as of June–July 2026.

**Key finding: There is NO pending (announced-but-unclosed) Mag 7 acquisition of $10B or more as of June–July 2026.**

The two largest genuine Mag 7 M&A deals of this cycle were both announced in 2025 and are already concluded:

1. **Alphabet/Google → Wiz — $32B** (cloud security). Google's largest-ever deal. **Closed March 11, 2026.** DOJ cleared Nov 2025; EU approved ~Feb 2026.

2. **Nvidia → Groq — ~$20B** (announced Dec 24, 2025). Deliberately structured as a **non-exclusive licensing / reverse-acquihire** to sidestep antitrust merger review; drew a March 2026 Senate inquiry and FTC scrutiny.

**Mid-2026 Mag 7 capital deployment is NOT M&A** — it's dominated by:
- **AI capex:** ~$725B combined hyperscaler spending in 2026 (+77% YoY).
- **Strategic investment (not acquisition):** Amazon's **$50B investment in OpenAI** (announced Feb 27, 2026).

Sub-$10B Mag 7 deals: Meta/Manus (~$2B, ordered unwound by China in April 2026) and Meta/ARI robotics (undisclosed).

The biggest 2026 megadeals are **outside the Mag 7** (Netflix–WBD ~$83B, EA $55B, Charter–Cox $34.5B, SpaceX–xAI $250B).

*Note: AskNews real-time feeds were rate-limited, so findings rely on CNBC, Bloomberg, Forbes, TechCrunch, PwC, and Wikipedia (accessed 2026-07-03). Full structured findings with sources and data points have been submitted.*

sources.snippet: Amazon ~$200B, Microsoft ~$190B, Alphabet $175-185B, Meta $115-135B 2026 capex; combined ~$725B (+77% YoY).

key_facts: No PENDING (announced-but-unclosed) Magnificent 7 acquisition of $10B or more is publicly known as of June–July 2026.
Alphabet/Google's $32B all-cash acquisition of Wiz (cloud security) — its largest ever — CLOSED March 11, 2026 (announced 2025).

Nvidia's ~$20B Groq deal (announced Dec 24, 2025) was structured as a non-exclusive licensing/reverse-acquihire to avoid antitrust review; drew Senate (Warren/Blumenthal) and FTC scrutiny in March 2026.
Amazon announced a $50B INVESTMENT in OpenAI on Feb 27, 2026 ($15B initial + $35B on conditions) — an investment/partnership, not an acquisition.
Meta's ~$2B Manus acquisition (late Dec 2025) was ordered unwound by China's NDRC on April 27, 2026 — below the $10B threshold.
Mag 7 mid-2026 capital deployment centers on AI capex (~$725B combined hyperscaler capex in 2026, +77% YoY) and equity investments, not outright M&A.
The biggest 2026 megadeals are outside the Mag 7: Netflix–Warner Bros. Discovery (~$83B pending), PIF/Silver Lake–EA ($55B), Charter–Cox ($34.5B), IBM–Confluent ($11B completed).
SpaceX–xAI ($250B, 2026) is cited as the largest-ever acquisition but involves non-Mag-7 Musk private entities.
No fresh $10B+ Mag 7 takeover was credibly announced or rumored specifically in mid-2026 (June–July 2026) in the sources reviewed.

data_points.metric: Alphabet/Google acquisition of Wiz (cloud security) - deal value
Amazon investment in OpenAI (investment, not acquisition)
Amazon initial tranche of OpenAI investment
Meta/Manus acquisition value (ordered unwound by China NDRC)
Combined hyperscaler (Amazon, Microsoft, Alphabet, Meta) AI capex guidance for 2026
SpaceX-xAI acquisition (non-Mag-7, cited as largest-ever acquisition)
Netflix pending acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery (non-Mag-7)
